summary: Refreshed Owlory's repo-default Xcode simulator destination from the unavailable iPhone 16 / iOS 26.3.1 pair to the standard iPhone 17 / iOS 26.5 simulator now installed for Xcode 26.5. The change updates Tools/validate.sh, Makefile UI lanes, the running-app smoke runner, smoke parser tests, and validation docs while preserving OWLORY_XCODE_DESTINATION as the override path. This prevents future agents from needing hidden local knowledge or a custom simulator UDID to run the default runtime validation lane.

contract_status_changes.before: Tools/validate.sh, Makefile UI lanes, running_app_smoke.py, and validation docs defaulted to platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16,OS=26.3.1. That runtime is no longer installed after the Xcode 26.5 simulator repair, so the default runtime validation path failed unless the agent remembered a local OWLORY_XCODE_DESTINATION override.
contract_status_changes.after: The default destination is platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17,OS=26.5 across the validation script, UI Makefile lanes, smoke runner, tests, and validation docs. make test-domain DOMAIN=runtime now passes without an environment override on the repaired Xcode 26.5 setup.

contract_status_changes.before: ui-testing-hygiene.md named an old hardcoded iPhone 16 simulator UDID from the prior iOS 26.3.1 runtime.
contract_status_changes.after: ui-testing-hygiene.md now tells agents to erase the available simulator selected from simctl instead of relying on a stale UDID.

residual_risks: This slice updates the default simulator destination only. Historical proof artifacts that accurately name iPhone 16 / iOS 26.3.1 were intentionally not rewritten.

The first iOS 26.5 runtime installation attempt left an unusable duplicate CoreSimulator disk-image record. It does not block validation, but future environment cleanup may remove it via simctl runtime tooling if it becomes noisy.
The maintained UI smoke/regression suites were not rerun in this slice. Their defaults now point at iPhone 17 / iOS 26.5, but this slice's proof is the runtime domain lane plus automation tests.
recommended_next_reason: Clean stop. Blocked TestFlight/localization/UI expansion slices remain parked behind their entry conditions.
